def create_order_response(order) -> dict:
    if order.total > 1000:
        order.status = "pending_review"
        order.requires_approval = True
        order.approval_threshold = 1000
    elif order.total > 500:
        order.discount = order.total * 0.05
        order.status = "processing"
    else:
        order.status = "processing"

    return {
        "id": order.id,
        "total": order.total,
        "status": order.status,
        "discount": getattr(order, "discount", 0),
        "requires_approval": getattr(order, "requires_approval", False),
        "created_at": order.created_at.isoformat(),
    }


def update_product_pricing(product, new_cost: float) -> dict:
    markup = 1.5 if product.category == "electronics" else 1.3
    product.price = new_cost * markup
    product.updated_at = datetime.utcnow()

    if product.price > 100:
        product.shipping_class = "oversized"
    else:
        product.shipping_class = "standard"

    return {
        "id": product.id,
        "name": product.name,
        "price": product.price,
        "shipping_class": product.shipping_class,
        "updated_at": product.updated_at.isoformat(),
    }
